NetSpeed Indicator mobile application (the "Service") is provided by Nisarg Jhaveri ("us", "we", or "our").This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our Service.We use your data to provide and improve the Service.By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

User FeedbackThe feedback you send us via email may contain certain personally identifiable information ("Personal Data") including you email address and name.This information can be used to contact you or improve the Service.

Network Speed and Usage DataShowing network speed and mobile and wifi usage data on your device is one of the primary function of the Service.The network speed and network usage data is stored on your device alone and isnot transmitted or collectedby us.

Service ProvidersWe may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service ("Service Providers"), to provide the Service on our behalf, to perform Service-related services or to assist us in analyzing how our Service is used.These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

Links To Other SitesOur Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us.If you click on a third party link, you will be directed to that third party's site.We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit.We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any

Changes To This Privacy PolicyWe may

update our Privacy Policy from time to time.We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.These changes are effective immediately, after they are posted on this page.
